displayName: Saba University School of Medicine — Caribbean
title: Document Checklist
subtitle: SUSOM MD program · Admission, visa & clinical years
policyBanner: Verify current tuition, intake dates, and admission requirements on saba.edu before quoting clients. Indian students: confirm NEET eligibility and NMC guidance separately. MD is not Indian-style MBBS — counsel FMGE/NExT pathway.

items.title: Completed SUSOM online application (Common Application portal)
items.note: Apply via saba.edu/admissions/how-to-apply/ — save progress and submit supporting docs as received.

items.title: Official transcripts (10th, 12th, bachelor's / pre-med)
items.note: Unofficial acceptable for initial review; official required if admitted.

items.title: NEET scorecard (Indian applicants — if required under current NMC rules)
items.note: Verify NMC foreign medical study notification for admission year.

items.title: Passport copy — valid 6+ months beyond program
Proof of tuition payment or financial guarantee
items.note: Seasoned funds — verify amount on official tuition page.

items.title: Visa application per Dutch Caribbean / Netherlands consulate guidance
items.note: Verify current student residence rules for Saba (Caribbean Netherlands).

items.title: US visa strategy documented (typically F-1 or as advised by university)
SEVIS / I-20 if applicable for US clinical portion
Health insurance for US clinical sites
Updated financial proof for US rotation city living costs
Tuition quote verified on saba.edu/admissions/tuition-and-fees/
items.note: Never quote from agent brochures alone.

items.title: Consultancy fee invoice separate from university payment
Client reviewed, signed, and dated this checklist
NMC foreign medical institutions list checked (Indian clients)
items.note: Verify on nmc.org.in at time of enrollment.

items.title: Application lodged; confirmation saved on client file
